title: cyperus adscendens
intro: Cyperus adscendens, also known as umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a perennial herb native to tropical Asia, characterized by its umbrella-like inflorescence. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, among others. Cyperus adscendens can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, often mixed with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
